Log:
  This port needs USES=compiler:c++11-lang and #include <strings.h> in
  src/grammar/Sqlite3Lexer.hpp to build on GCC-based architectures.

  While here, add USES=gnome.

  PR:		234206
  Submitted by:	Piotr Kubaj
  Approved by:	maintainer
